query:
SELECT 'forum_categories' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM forum_categories
UNION ALL SELECT 'forum_posts', COUNT(*) FROM forum_posts
UNION ALL SELECT 'forum_replies', COUNT(*) FROM forum_replies
UNION ALL SELECT 'post_likes', COUNT(*) FROM post_likes
UNION ALL SELECT 'reply_likes', COUNT(*) FROM reply_likes
UNION ALL SELECT 'support_tickets', COUNT(*) FROM support_tickets
UNION ALL SELECT 'ticket_messages', COUNT(*) FROM ticket_messages
UNION ALL SELECT 'customers', COUNT(*) FROM customers
UNION ALL SELECT 'customer_logs', COUNT(*) FROM customer_logs;

UNION ALL SELECT 'forum_replies', COUNT(*) FROM forum_replies
UNION ALL SELECT 'post_likes', COUNT(*) FROM post_likes
UNION ALL SELECT 'reply_likes', COUNT(*) FROM reply_likes
